notes: v3.0.14 — Hotfix + usage widgets. CRITICAL FIX: removed installer's explorer.exe taskkill that was breaking the Windows taskbar on fresh installs since v3.0.11 (no more disappearing Start menu / system tray after install). NEW: always-on weekly + monthly usage counter widgets on Home and Stats pages — see your dictation pace at any usage level, not just when crossing the 80% cap threshold. Monthly counter is informational (no cap). Backend: dual diagnostic logs added to free_tier_get_banner and free_tier_get_counters commands so banner-not-showing bugs surface to voio-debug.log instead of failing silently.
